name: Weatherford International plc
business: Weatherford International plc is a global energy services company providing equipment and services for drilling, evaluation, well construction, completion, production, intervention, and abandonment of oil and gas wells, as well as new energy platforms. The company operates in approximately 75 countries. Its customers include national oil companies, international and independent oil and gas companies, and new energy companies.
sellsTo: oil and gas exploration and production companies
international and independent oil and gas companies

exposures.sentence: We are a leading global energy services company providing equipment and services used in the drilling, evaluation, well construction, completion, production, intervention, and responsible abandonment of wells in the oil and natural gas exploration and production industry as well as new energy platforms.
We also develop technologies for new energy markets, in addition to the existing oil and gas markets in which we traditionally operate.
Our business could be negatively affected by cybersecurity incidents and other technology disruptions.
We are integrating AI tools into our systems and certain products, and many of our third-party service providers, as well as our competitors, are also developing and using such tools.
